ogTitle: Sandy Point vs Sans Souci: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sandy Point and Sans Souci.
heading: Sandy Point vs Sans Souci — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sandy Point, New South Wales and Sans Souci, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sandy Point and Sans Souci have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Sandy Point or Sans Souci safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sandy Point has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Sans Souci scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sandy Point scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Sans Souci scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sandy Point or Sans Souci?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sandy Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
